channel.title: Projects on Yukai Wang
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yukai Wang

item.title: Multi-Agent Simulation Based on Reinforcement Learning
item.description: This project was funded by HUAWEI. The characteristics of the traffic system are dynamic and complicated. Traditional traffic simulation software can imitate the behavior of traffic participants, but it is a far cry from reality. By interacting with the environment, agents can acquire knowledge or enhance their performance via reinforcement learning techniques. According to the agent’s predetermined objectives, in a specific environment and under a specific policy, specific actions are performed and incentives are acquired.

item.title: Intelligent Transportation Network Driven by Digital Twin
item.description: This project was funded by Wuhan Traffic Management Bureau. This research attempts to use the burgeoning big data technologies to investigate the urban transportation system based on digital twins. It solves the disadvantages of conventional approaches, such as limited data support and poor analytical precision, and speeds the integration of essential technologies, such as artificial intelligence, with transportation-specific knowledge. The purpose of this project is mainly the following three points. Initially, the value of traffic data may be increased by fusing and mining vast amount of data.

item.title: Nanjing Qingliang Mountain Underground Space Simulation
item.description: This project was funded by School of Transportation in Southeast University. Multiple causes, including the People’s Hospital, contribute to severe traffic congestion in the Qingliang Mountain area of Gulou District in Nanjing. Consider using the underground area to construct a subway station and conduct a simulation-based traffic impact study. What type of crowd-gathering impact would the subway station be designed to create? What effect would a set of schemes, such as addresses, have on the road network after they are specified?

item.title: Suzhou Ancient City Digital Twin Platform
item.description: This project was funded by BOYUXIN. Digital twin is a significant direction and application scenario for the development of informatization in the transportation, as well as a key visualization technique for smart city. The digital twin’s technical advantages include digital identification, simultaneous visualization, virtual-real interaction, and intelligent control, and it will bring new solutions and avenues for intelligent parking management and intelligent driving. In this project, my job includes Building up the parking lots on the SUMO simulation platform.

item.title: Traffic Visualization Integrated Application System
item.description: This project was funded by Yangzhou Road Management Department. The intelligent traffic visualization application with large-scale data statistics and integration is the centralized statistics and display of data for each highway management platform subsystem. It may also increase the quality of expressway service, the quality of highway service, the stability of expressway traffic operation, and the dependability of the road network under adverse weather conditions. Future requirements for the rapid expansion of roadways can be met by an integrated application of intelligent traffic visualization with rich data content and intuitive display.
